title: Cobblemon Capture Border Reimagined
description: Start in a small area, capture Pokémon to expand it.
body:
Have you ever been thinking to yourself, "I want a datapack that adds to my Cobblemon experience by limiting my world border size, only to increase it every time I capture a Pokémon, and I want it in **1.21.1**"? This addon, inspired by tmetcalfe89's [Capture Border](https://modrinth.com/datapack/cobblemon-capture-border), does just that! Through the use of Molang™, this addon brings the magic of Cobblemon-ified world border datapacks to Minecraft version 1.21.1 and beyond (Though we haven't quite gotten to that "beyond" yet).

How It Works:
- After creating your Minecraft world, you will have 15 seconds to choose the place to start your Capture Border journey
- The starting world border is 8x8 blocks, and it grows by 1 block for each Pokémon you capture, 2 if its a new species!
- In servers, the world border will center itself around the first player online, and any capturing of Pokémon done by any player will add to the world border's size. Unique species bonuses apply per-player, not per-species

![Pack Icon](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3fdd2a9fd37b9459c9966dc582a54847f828b6ad.png)
